name: Pot Roast (Microwave)
recipeInstructions:
Moisten both sides of the beef chuck roast with water and sprinkle generously with MICRO-SHAKE. Pierce the meat with a fork at 1/2 inch intervals.
Place the meat in a 3-quart casserole dish with the desired liquid. Cover with plastic wrap or glass lid.
Microwave on HIGH for 5 minutes. Reduce power to MEDIUM and continue to microwave for an additional 25 minutes.
Turn the meat over and arrange the vegetables around it. Recover with the lid. Microwave on MEDIUM for an additional 25-35 minutes, or until the meat and vegetables are fork tender.
Allow the meat and vegetables to stand, covered, for 5-10 minutes while making gravy, if desired.
Serves 4.
